rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SABRINA SAUNDERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash And Dismiss The Current Action; Mpa; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 20, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANT SABRINA SAUNDERS, ANTHONY SAUNDERS, EDWARD SAUNDERS Notice Of Motion To Quash And Dismiss The Current Action; Mpa; Declaration DENIED. See Borsuk v Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. Also, no California authority cited for the proposition that a new unlawful detainer action cannot be based on the notice previously relied upon in an action that was dismissed without prejudice. = (501/REQ)
